examples: A related puzzle for scientists is the present distribution of Varanus' largest surviving species, the Komodo dragon.
Komodo National Park, officially recognized in 1980, is popular for ecotourism because of its unique biodiversity.
The spines of a fire urchin form a multicolored flower off Komodo Island, Indonesia.
Three young Komodo dragons have gone missing at a zoo in the Indonesian city of Surabaya.
The Komodo dragon, simply the biggest and fattest lizard on earth, is undisputed superstar of the park.
